asset_name: Tirzepatide Authorised Product, Identity and Regulatory Source Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_type: Authorised product and molecular identity evidence
controlled_conclusion: Tirzepatide is the active substance in exact authorised MOUNJARO and ZEPBOUND products. The current ZEPBOUND label covers chronic weight management and moderate-to-severe obstructive sleep apnoea in adults with obesity. Catalogue TR powders do not inherit any authorised product's formulation, pen system, concentration, quality or indication.

sources.title: ZEPBOUND current United States prescribing information
MOUNJARO current United States prescribing information

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised finished product to catalogue supplier powder
Transfer from trial material to unverified supplier material
Creation of dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
next_review_trigger: Material label, indication, safety, regulatory, trial, manufacturer, quality or supplier-evidence change
